capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a privileged access management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a privileged access management service?

questions.prompt: Is the privileged access management service reviewed frequently to measure its efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the privileged access management service reviewed frequently to measure its efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy a PAM system to manage privileged accounts?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise deploy a PAM system to manage privileged accounts?
questions.evaluation_focus: PAM system deployed for privileged accounts

questions.prompt: Does the solution manage privileged accounts enterprise-wide for all applications and systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the solution manage privileged accounts enterprise-wide for all applications and systems?

questions.prompt: Does the PAM solution have the capability to automate PAM user lifecycle and access?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the PAM solution have the capability to automate PAM user lifecycle and access?
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated PAM user lifecycle and access

questions.prompt: Is the PAM solution configuration reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the PAM solution configuration reviewed frequently for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Is the PAM solution integrated with applications, endpoint devices, and network devices to provide restricted access to non-privileged accounts?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the PAM solution integrated with applications, endpoint devices, and network devices to provide restricted access to non-privileged accounts?
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with applications, endpoints, and network devices

questions.prompt: Does the PAM service have formalized documented KPIs and KRIs?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the PAM service have formalized documented KPIs and KRIs?

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs reviewed for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate are the KPIs and KRIs reviewed for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Is there a formalized documented process for providing privileged access to application resources?
questions.intent: Evaluate is there a formalized documented process for providing privileged access to application resources?

questions.prompt: Is the PAM access process unified and applicable to access all application assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the PAM access process unified and applicable to access all application assets?

questions.prompt: Is the PAM access process automated with self-requesting portals?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the PAM access process automated with self-requesting portals?

questions.prompt: Is the PAM access provisioning process reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the PAM access provisioning process reviewed frequently for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Is there a formalized documented process for providing privileged escalation to endpoint resources, such as admin privilege on laptops and desktops?
questions.intent: Evaluate is there a formalized documented process for providing privileged escalation to endpoint resources, such as admin privilege on laptops and desktops?

questions.prompt: Is the PAM access process unified and applicable to access all endpoint assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the PAM access process unified and applicable to access all endpoint assets?

questions.prompt: Is the PAM access process automated with self-requesting portals?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the PAM access process automated with self-requesting portals?

questions.prompt: Is the PAM access provisioning process reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the PAM access provisioning process reviewed frequently for efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a separate service manager for PAM services who is dedicated to managing privileged accounts only?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a separate service manager for PAM services who is dedicated to managing privileged accounts only?

questions.prompt: Or is the IAM engineer or custodian the owner of privileged accounts?
questions.intent: Evaluate or is the IAM engineer or custodian the owner of privileged accounts?
questions.evaluation_focus: Separation from IAM engineer or custodian ownership

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for logging privileged account activity and lifecycle changes to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate is there a formal documented process for logging privileged account activity and lifecycle changes to the SOC?
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented PAM activity logging to SOC

questions.prompt: Is logging of privileged account activity and lifecycle changes made securely to the SOC? (This is different from authentication logs or credential creation logs.)
questions.intent: Evaluate is logging of privileged account activity and lifecycle changes made securely to the SOC? (This is different from authentication logs or credential creation logs.)
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure privileged account logging to SOC

questions.prompt: Are dynamic changes to privileged account activity and lifecycle captured and transferred to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate are dynamic changes to privileged account activity and lifecycle captured and transferred to the SOC?
questions.evaluation_focus: Dynamic privileged account changes to SOC
